goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'j restaurant'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '4 people' at '17:45' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'kings lynn' and should 'leave after 09:30'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called j restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 17:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should go to kings lynn and should leave after 09:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
